## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss logistics and planning for the upcoming executive dinner event and CCW conference.](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Decided on menu options: Wagyu tenderloin, halibut, and vegetarian/vegan option](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Agreed to have just photographer (not videographer) for the dinner](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Will explore centerpiece options instead of flowers for table decor](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Need to increase outreach efforts from sales team for driving RSVPs](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Discussed leveraging AI/assistants to automate repetitive tasks](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)

## Topics

### Menu and Catering

  - [Wagyu tenderloin ($20 per person upcharge) and halibut selected as main entree options](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Vegetarian/vegan option to be offered as silent/unprinted option](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Considering Chilean sea bass or black cod instead of salmon for fish option](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

### Event Photography/Videography

  - [Decided to just have photographer, not videographer for cost savings](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Photographer cost is $400/day which is reasonable](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

### Table Decor

  - [Exploring centerpiece options with company logo instead of floral arrangements](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Already have table numbers from last year](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)

### Driving Event RSVPs

  - [Sales team needs to increase outreach efforts for RSVPs](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Jordan to send Marcel list of AEs who haven't driven many RSVPs yet](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Potential to involve VCs, Bradley from Project Voice, and FWD investors](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)

### Leveraging AI/Assistants

  - [Discussed hiring assistants in Philippines for $800/month](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Have them do repetitive tasks like research, data entry using AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Upskill team on breaking down processes to delegate to assistants](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jordan to message venue about Chilean sea bass/black cod option](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Jordan to send Marcel list of AEs needing RSVP assistance](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Reach out to VCs, Bradley, FWD investors about attending](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Explore centerpiece options with company branding](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Start planning to leverage AI assistants for repetitive tasks](https://fathom.video/share/8uzmx9e_sRUP8-TyUYUfAiGW7izJG-bH?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
